description: This file contains functions for extracting a person's name and current role/title from unstructured text, especially resumes and related documents. It includes parsing category headers, selecting relevant text segments, and heuristics for identifying names and roles.

methods.name: extractNameAndCurrentRole
methods.description: Extracts a person's name and role from unstructured text, using heuristics and category headers.

methods.name: extractBestNameAndRoleFromDocuments
methods.description: Aggregates multiple categorized documents to extract the best-effort name and role, prioritizing resume and job description categories.
